title: stillingia spathulata
intro: Stillingia spathulata, also known as Queen's Delight or Spotted Spurge, is a perennial herb native to the southeastern United States, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stillingia spathulata include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as relieving skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Stillingia spathulata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
